name: Beef Nacho Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Brown the meat and drain it.
2. Stir in the salsa, corn, Miracle Whip, and chili powder.
3. Layer half of the meat mixture, chips, and cheese in a 2-quart casserole dish.
4. Repeat layers with the remaining ingredients.
5. Bake for 20 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
6. Top with shredded lettuce and chopped tomato, if desired.
